prompt.short_description: ONCard 1.0 is here with smarter studying and cleaner workflows.

whats_new.title: Welcome to ONCard 1.0
whats_new.description: The full release brings smarter study tools, cleaner flows, and a more polished app.
points: Files To Cards can turn slides, PDFs, and note images into study questions.
Study mode now includes softer grading, follow-up help, and an I don't know shortcut.
Setup is simpler now with one required Gemma model and a cleaner flow.
